scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm --prefix client run start" "npm --prefix server run start"
scripts.build: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm --prefix client run build" "npm --prefix server run build"
